subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The letter which thou didst write to the honoured travelers was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه که بحضرات مسافرین مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید جان و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @the power of words; of speech, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
